beginner_a1_init.message0: init Beginner A1 car %1 max speed %2
beginner_a1_init.tooltip: Create and initialize the car object: communication, motors, servos, LED and battery; auto-refresh in the loop

beginner_a1_button.tooltip: Check whether remote button A/B/C/D is pressed

beginner_a1_joystick.tooltip: Read remote joystick value, range -127 to 127 (0 when disconnected)

beginner_a1_drive.tooltip: Differential drive: forward and turn values range -127 to 127

beginner_a1_motor.tooltip: Set left/right motor speed individually, range -120 to 120, negative reverses

beginner_a1_servo.tooltip: Positional servo smoothly moves to the given angle, range 0 to 360 degrees

beginner_a1_servo_rotate.tooltip: Continuous-rotation servo: spin by direction and speed for the given seconds then auto-stop (speed 0-100), non-blocking
